entities.description: teenage boy with slim build, wearing a blue hooded raincoat, dark shorts, sneakers, wet bangs visible under hood
small gray cat with short fur, bright eyes, striped tail, sharp ears, expressive face
old metal streetlamp glowing in the rainy night, casting a circular pool of light
narrow city alley at night with wet pavement, brick walls, puddles, distant signs, heavy rain

panels.summary: Wide establishing shot of a narrow rainy city alley at night, wet pavement shining under an old streetlamp, dramatic manga rain lines.
The boy in a blue hooded raincoat walks alone through the alley, shoulders hunched against the rain, puddles splashing around his sneakers.
Low angle close-up of a small gray cat sitting beneath the streetlamp, dry only in the tiny circle of light, staring directly at the boy.
The boy stops suddenly, turning toward the cat with wide eyes; rain drips from his hood, the alley behind him dark and empty.
Close-up on the gray cat lifting its head and speaking calmly, its eyes bright and intelligent; rain streaks frame the panel.
The boy recoils in shock, one foot splashing backward into a puddle; the cat remains composed beneath the streetlamp.
The cat walks ahead along the wet alley with tail raised, glancing back; the boy hesitantly follows, keeping his hood low.
They reach a darker bend in the alley; the cat paws at a glowing crack between old bricks while the boy kneels beside it, amazed.
Final dramatic shot: the brick wall opens into a bright mysterious doorway, rain frozen in shimmering lines as the boy and gray cat face it together.

text.content: 他们的秘密冒险开始了。
